forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear. Low around 54, with temperatures rising to around 56 overnight. South southwest wind around 2 mph.

forecast.name: Sunday
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny. High near 77, with temperatures falling to around 74 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 2 to 10 mph.

weather_report:
As dawn breaks gently over Downtown San Francisco, the city basks in the promise of a sunny Sunday. The air is crisp yet comfortably mild, with the temperature resting around the mid-fifties—a subtle reminder of the warmth to come. The hills and streets are mostly clear, showcasing a landscape that vibrates with the anticipation of an afternoon reaching close to 77 degrees. A soft breath of wind from the southwest carries with it the freshness of the bay, beckoning morning strollers and those seeking solace in the early light.

For the day ahead, a sunny disposition appears unblemished by any hint of the infamous fog. Instead, the sunlight illuminates the vibrant fabric of city life, inviting a leisurely exploration of bustling cafes or a serene stroll along the waterfront. Dressing lightly is advised, perhaps starting with a light jacket that can be shrugged off as the day warms under the golden California sun. The calm conditions are ideal for simple pleasures—consider finding a spot in a park to savor a good book, or visiting a local market to indulge in fresh produce and artisanal delights. In this charming ambiance, life in San Francisco feels both invigorating and soothing, as the city reveals its best self.
